entries.author: rootazero

entries.author: rootazero

entries.name: Aleph Diagnostics

entries.author: rootazero

entries.author: rootazero

entries.author: rootazero

entries.author: rootazero

entries.name: Context7

entries.author: Upstash

entries.name: 智谱视觉理解 Z.AI Vision
entries.description: Gives coding agents sight: screenshot-to-code, OCR, error-screenshot diagnosis, and diagram/chart understanding (GLM-4.6V, official Z.AI/Zhipu).

env.name: Z_AI_API_KEY

env.description: 服务平台：ZHIPU（大陆）或 ZAI（海外）

entries.author: 智谱 AI Z.AI

entries.name: 高德地图 Amap
entries.description: Geocoding, POI search, route planning, and weather from AutoNavi (Amap), China-native.

entries.author: 高德 AutoNavi

entries.name: MiniMax

entries.author: MiniMax

entries.name: 火山引擎 veImageX
entries.description: Text-to-image, super-resolution, outpainting, and OCR image capabilities from Volcengine (official).
entries.author: 火山引擎 ByteDance

entries.name: SiliconFlow 媒体生成
entries.description: Aleph's official SiliconFlow media-generation MCP — image / video / TTS over an npx stdio process.

env.name: SILICONFLOW_API_BASE
env.description: 可选：覆盖区域端点（默认 https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1；海外用 .com）

env.name: SILICONFLOW_IMAGE_DIR
env.description: 可选：本地保存生成的图片/视频目录（否则仅返回临时 URL）

env.name: SILICONFLOW_AUDIO_DIR
env.description: 可选：音频保存目录（默认同 SILICONFLOW_IMAGE_DIR）

env.description: 可选：覆盖区域端点（默认 https://ai.t8star.org/v1；可改 .cn 镜像）

env.name: T8STAR_IMAGE_DIR

env.name: T8STAR_AUDIO_DIR
env.description: 可选：音频保存目录（默认同 T8STAR_IMAGE_DIR）

entries.author: rootazero

entries.name: Playwright MCP
entries.description: Browser-automation MCP server that lets agents drive Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit through Playwright—navigate, click, fill forms, and capture accessibility snapshots.
entries.author: microsoft

entries.name: Desktop Commander
entries.description: Gives Claude terminal control with filesystem search and edit across your machine—run commands, manage processes, and read or modify files.
entries.author: wonderwhy-er

entries.name: Mobile MCP
entries.description: Mobile-automation MCP server for iOS and Android—drives simulators, emulators, and physical devices for UI testing and scraping.
entries.author: mobile-next

entries.name: Builder Skills
entries.description: Builder.io's official skill bundle for coding agents—headlined by Agent-Native visual planning (visual-plan) and its companion status recaps (visual-recap), plus docs-first discipline, autonomous execution, cross-agent review, and efficiency guards across 10 skills.
entries.author: BuilderIO

entries.name: Humanizer (Chinese)
entries.description: A Chinese writing-quality editor that strips the tell-tale patterns of AI prose—clichés, three-part parallelism, vague attribution, em-dash overuse, formulaic structure—so text reads like a person, not a model. Ported from blader/humanizer, built on Wikipedia's "signs of AI writing".
entries.author: op7418

entries.name: Guizang Web PPT
entries.description: Generates single-file HTML horizontal-swipe slide decks in two looks—editorial "magazine × e-ink" (serif + WebGL fluid background) and Swiss International style (sans-serif + dot grid)—with chapter covers, big-type data slides, and image grids. By 歸藏 (Guizang).
entries.author: op7418

entries.name: Taste Skill
entries.description: A Claude Code plugin that gives coding agents design taste—a bundle of frontend skills (brutalist, minimalist, soft, redesign, stitch, brandkit, image-to-code, imagegen, and more) to stop agents from generating boring, generic UI.
entries.author: Leonxlnx

entries.name: Agent Reach
entries.description: Gives an AI agent internet access—read and search 13 platforms (Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, GitHub, LinkedIn, V2EX, RSS, web pages, podcasts) through one CLI with multi-backend routing and zero paid APIs.
entries.author: Panniantong

entries.name: Web Design
entries.description: A two-phase web visual-design skill: first produce a standardized DESIGN.md spec from your PRD / reference URL / screenshot / keywords, then generate UI/UX, visual, motion, and responsive web code that meets it.
entries.author: xiaopu-ai

entries.name: Data Craft
entries.description: Generate beautiful, self-contained themed HTML data displays—charts, dashboards, reports, tearsheets, briefings—in one of six visual idioms, each with a matched visual language and writing voice so the format and tone fit the content.
entries.author: yixiliu617

entries.name: PPT Master
entries.description: Turn a PDF / DOCX / URL / Markdown into a natively editable PPTX through a serial multi-role pipeline (strategist → executor → quality check → export): the agent hand-writes one SVG page at a time, then post-processes into real DrawingML shapes, text boxes, charts and animations—optionally following your own .pptx template and voicing speaker notes as audio narration.
entries.author: hugohe3

entries.name: Huashu Design
entries.description: An HTML-native design skill that has the agent embody the right specialist (UX / animator / slide designer / prototyper) to produce hi-fi prototypes, 1920×1080 HTML slide decks, timeline-driven animations and side-by-side design variants—backed by 20 design philosophies, a 5-dimension review, an anti-'AI slop' discipline, and optional MP4/GIF export.
entries.author: alchaincyf

entries.name: Baoyu Slide Deck
entries.description: Turn content into a professional slide deck rendered as images—the skill first writes an outline with per-slide style instructions, then generates each slide as an individual image. Decks are tuned for reading and sharing (self-explanatory, logical scroll flow, social-media-friendly) rather than live presentation.
entries.author: JimLiu

entries.name: HTML PPT Studio
entries.description: Author professional static HTML presentations from a large template library—36 swappable themes, 31 single-page layouts, 15 full-deck templates, and 27 CSS plus 20 canvas-FX animations—all on a shared token-based design system, with a keyboard runtime (theme/animation hotkeys, presenter mode, notes drawer) and headless-Chrome PNG export.
entries.author: lewislulu

entries.name: Ultimate PPT Master
entries.description: Turn a one-line request, messy source files, or a structured brief into either a natively editable PPTX deck or a magazine-style web slide deck. It first auto-expands a thin prompt into a "best-effect brief" (audience, scenario, core message, route, style), then runs source→brief→assets→generate→verify→export, optionally generating key visuals with GPT/Gemini image models and keeping a render-review and delivery audit trail.
entries.author: kdnsna

entries.name: Web Shader Extractor
entries.description: Extract a webpage's WebGL/WebGPU/Canvas/shader visual effect and rebuild it as a standalone native-JS project. Locks the target rendering surface, gathers shader/resource/render-graph/timing evidence, builds an evidence-matched local baseline, then projectizes it—evidence before guessing, baseline before refactor.
entries.author: lixiaolin94

entries.name: Weekly Report
entries.description: Generate a send-ready weekly report by collecting evidence across four channel families—collaboration platforms, Git history, agent sessions, and local docs—normalizing it, merging into work topics, and writing a structured report that separates facts from inference. Resolves an absolute date range before collecting.
entries.author: lixiaolin94

entries.name: Obsidian Skills
entries.description: Five skills that teach an agent to work with an Obsidian vault's open formats—Obsidian Flavored Markdown (wikilinks, callouts, embeds, properties), Bases (.base) database views, JSON Canvas (.canvas), the Obsidian CLI, and Defuddle web-to-clean-markdown. By Obsidian's own maker, Steph Ango (kepano).
entries.author: kepano

entries.name: Understand Anything
entries.description: A multi-agent Claude Code plugin that analyzes any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph—every file, function, class, and dependency as a clickable node with plain-English summaries—plus guided tours, fuzzy/semantic search, diff impact analysis, architectural layer grouping, and a business-domain view.
entries.author: Egonex-AI

entries.name: Paper Analyzer
entries.description: Turn an academic paper (arXiv link, PDF, or pasted text) into a polished, shareable HTML deep-dive article. Runs a mandatory multi-round workflow: read the full paper, search GitHub for the matching code and cross-reference it, then write in one of three styles—storytelling / academic / concise—with KaTeX formulas and Mermaid diagrams. Zero config, no API keys.
entries.author: zsyggg

entries.name: Paper Comic
entries.description: Turn a paper's core method into visual method figures that explain exactly what it does and how. Reads the paper, proposes a cover / overview / mechanism-detail figure plan, and—only after you confirm scope, count, language, and style—generates 1–10 figures in a warm sketchnote or publication-grade paper-figure style.
entries.author: zsyggg

entries.name: Paper Deck
entries.description: Turn a paper, article, or technical note into a designed AIGC slide deck that doesn't look like a template. Builds a deck brief and slide-by-slide outline, writes a reproducible visual prompt per page, generates 16:9 slide images via a raster image backend, and merges them into .pptx and .pdf. Four style presets; can mount real figures cropped from the source PDF.
entries.author: zsyggg

entries.name: Black White Text Opener
entries.description: Create reusable black-background, white-text opening animations—large text typed in character by character, synchronized typing-click SFX, optional word swaps, and a clean transition into the main video. Original opener creation, not reference matching.
entries.author: Pluviobyte

entries.name: Dark SaaS Magic Video
entries.description: Create dark, cinematic SaaS/AI-product motion videos in a Presenton-like 'magic UI' style—black starfield stage, bottom purple glow, large kinetic type, gradient CTA buttons, floating UI templates, model rings, and speed-blur transitions. Style-level creation, not frame-accurate replication.
entries.author: Pluviobyte

entries.name: Reference Video Replica QC
entries.description: Make reference-video replication evidence-driven: classify the requested fidelity (pixel / visual / style), sample frames at a set interval, build timelines and side-by-side contact sheets, run PSNR/SSIM/hash checks, then approve or reject with hard evidence.
entries.author: Pluviobyte

entries.name: Ask Matt
entries.description: Ask which skill or flow fits your situation — a router over the user-invoked engineering skills in this repo.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Codebase Design
entries.description: Shared vocabulary for designing deep modules. Use when designing or improving a module's interface, finding deepening opportunities, deciding where a seam goes, or making code more testable and AI-navigable.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Diagnosing Bugs
entries.description: A disciplined diagnosis loop for hard bugs and performance regressions; use when something is broken, throwing, failing, or slow.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Domain Modeling
entries.description: Build and sharpen a project's domain model. Use when pinning down domain terminology or a ubiquitous language, recording an architectural decision, or when another skill needs to maintain the domain model.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Grill Me
entries.description: A relentless interview that stress-tests a plan or design until you reach shared understanding.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Grill With Docs
entries.description: A relentless interview that sharpens a plan or design while producing docs (ADRs and a glossary) as you go.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Grilling
entries.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design to stress-test it before building.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Handoff
entries.description: Compact the current conversation into a handoff document so a fresh agent can pick up the work.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Improve Codebase Architecture
entries.description: Scan a codebase for deepening opportunities, present them as a visual HTML report, then grill through whichever one you pick.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Prototype
entries.description: Build a throwaway prototype to flesh out a design — a runnable terminal app for state and business-logic questions, or several radically different UI variations toggleable from one route.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Setup Matt Pocock Skills
entries.description: Configure this repo for the engineering skills — issue tracker, triage label vocabulary, and domain doc layout. Run once before first use.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: TDD
entries.description: Test-driven development. Use when building features or fixing bugs test-first, when red-green-refactor is mentioned, or when you want integration tests.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Teach
entries.description: Teach you a new skill or concept across sessions, turning the current workspace into a stateful learning space.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: To Issues
entries.description: Break a plan, spec, or PRD into independently-grabbable issues on your project issue tracker using tracer-bullet vertical slices.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: To PRD
entries.description: Turn the current conversation into a PRD and publish it to your project issue tracker — no interview, just synthesis of what you've already discussed.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Triage
entries.description: Move issues and external PRs through a state machine of triage roles — categorise, verify, grill if needed, and write agent-ready briefs.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Writing Great Skills
entries.description: A reference of the vocabulary and principles that make an agent skill predictable, for writing and editing skills well.
entries.author: mattpocock

entries.name: Lanshu Animated Diagram
entries.description: Turn an article or system design into a premium black-canvas hand-drawn architecture/process diagram from one JSON spec, producing an editable .excalidraw source, a static PNG preview, and a genuinely animated GIF with moving flow highlights and pulsing module accents. Renders locally with Python/Pillow using a fixed art-directed layout, and ships frame-diff verification to prove the GIF actually moves.
entries.author: cclank

entries.name: GEO Brand Knowledge Graph
entries.description: Turns company materials, official sites, products, cases and people into an evidence-backed brand entity knowledge graph, outputting entity/relation lists, a disambiguation table, confidence tiers, Mermaid diagrams, JSON-LD, RDF triples and Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown reports.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Comparison Builder
entries.description: Generates evidence-bound, same-criteria GEO brand-comparison content (vs pages, alternatives, selection pages, FAQ) with a decision-dimension model, source ledger, and scoring matrix, delivered as Word, PDF, HTML, and Markdown.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Content Refiner
entries.description: Refactors existing SEO articles, WeChat posts, white papers, or product-page copy into GEO-friendly, AI-citable content, outputting an original GEO score, refined article, before/after diff, atomic fact cards, FAQ, and a four-format report.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Effect Monitor
entries.description: Designs a GEO answer-monitoring plan for Chinese answer engines (DeepSeek, Doubao, Qianwen, Kimi, Tencent Yuanbao): per-platform sampling specs, a prompt library, a six-layer metric system, citation-source tracking, a cautious attribution framework, a brand-fact correction loop, alert/threshold rules, dashboard fields and a DB/API draft, delivered as Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown reports.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Execution Roadmap
entries.description: Turns an existing GEO diagnosis and opportunity map into a 30/60/90-day execution plan with six project packages (page tech, content matrix, titles, knowledge base, external evidence, monitoring), roles, acceptance metrics, budget, and platform-specific actions for DeepSeek, Doubao, Qwen, Kimi, and Yuanbao, output in four formats.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Explainer Builder
entries.description: Builds a complete publishable GEO explainer article (how-to, concept explanation, buying guides, pitfalls, FAQ, glossary, evidence grading) plus a data-verification appendix, delivered as Markdown, HTML, Word, and PDF.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Knowledge Base Builder
entries.description: Builds an evidence-backed, auditable GEO brand knowledge base from official sites, product pages, help centers, white papers and trusted third-party sources, outputting a complete entity inventory, fact cards, FAQ, prohibited-expression list, source index with evidence tiers, downstream prompt input packs and a four-format Chinese report (Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF).
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Page Audit
entries.description: Audits a URL or small page set for GEO readiness across crawlability, structure, content evidence, and AI extractability, producing code-layer fixes, content/schema suggestions, an evidence ledger, and a four-format report with a quality-report.json self-check.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Page Blueprint
entries.description: Designs a GEO-friendly page blueprint for a product, topic, ranking, comparison, FAQ, knowledge-base, or case page, producing query fan-out coverage, information architecture, AI-extractable modules, semantic HTML, Schema candidates, a CMS field list, and a four-format report.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Panorama Audit
entries.description: Runs a full-brand GEO baseline audit by crawling the brand's official site, cross-verifying claims against public sources, and producing a 12-domain diagnosis with an onsite/offsite opportunity map and priorities, delivered as Word, PDF, HTML, and Markdown.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Ranking Article Builder
entries.description: Turns a brand brief, topic config, keywords, competitor set, and trusted sources into a traceable GEO ranking/review article (best/top/alternatives/vs/persona/use-case) with scoring methodology, comparison table, FAQ, and a sources table, delivered as Markdown, HTML, PDF, and Word.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Title Optimizer
entries.description: Generates, scores, and compliance-checks GEO title candidates for Chinese AI search platforms, mapping each title to an article structure and exporting Markdown, HTML, DOCX, and PDF reports.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: GEO Attribution & Tracking Planner
entries.description: From a company name plus optional supporting info, designs a company-specific GEO backend tracking and attribution PLAN: official-site verification, business-type and conversion-path mapping, direct-vs-indirect effect modeling, an observability estimation framework, data-model and metrics design, a prioritized roadmap, and optional rendered HTML and Word reports.
entries.author: yaojingang

entries.name: HyperFrames
entries.description: HyperFrames by HeyGen is an open-source Claude Code plugin that turns HTML/CSS/JS compositions into deterministic MP4 videos, bundling 19 on-demand skills—a router plus creation workflows (product launch, website-to-video, faceless explainer, PR-to-video, captions, motion graphics, music, slideshow) and domain skills (core composition contract, animation adapters, creative direction, media, CLI) that teach agents the full video-production loop.
entries.author: heygen-com

entries.name: FFmpeg Video Analyzer
entries.description: Analyzes a local video file by extracting frames with ffmpeg/ffprobe and delegating frame reading to disposable vision sub-agents, then synthesizes a timestamped, step-by-step Markdown summary (timeline, key moments, narrative).
entries.author: fabriqaai

entries.name: Remotion Best Practices
entries.description: Domain knowledge and best practices for building videos as code with Remotion (React)—animating via useCurrentFrame()/interpolate(), composition and sequence setup, captions, effects, audio, and a one-frame render check.
entries.author: remotion-dev

entries.name: Video Use
entries.description: Edit any video by conversation with a coding agent—transcribe, cut filler and dead space, color grade, generate overlay animations, and burn subtitles—reasoning from the raw transcript plus on-demand timeline visuals instead of frame-dumping.
entries.author: browser-use

entries.name: Manim Composer
entries.description: Turn a vague explainer-video idea into a detailed, scene-by-scene plan (scenes.md): researches the topic, asks about audience/scope/style, then specifies mobjects, animations, narration, pacing, and a color palette in 3Blue1Brown style—before any code is written.
entries.author: adithya-s-k

entries.name: Manim CE Best Practices
entries.description: Best practices for Manim Community Edition (the `from manim import *` / `manim` CLI engine): scene structure, mobjects, animations, LaTeX/MathTex, coordinate systems and graphing, 3D with ThreeDScene, camera control, updaters, styling, and CLI render flags.
entries.author: adithya-s-k

entries.name: ManimGL Best Practices
entries.description: Best practices for ManimGL (3Blue1Brown's OpenGL engine, `from manimlib import *` / `manimgl` CLI): InteractiveScene, Tex with tex_to_color_map, self.frame camera control, 3D, and the interactive `-se` / checkpoint_paste() development workflow.
entries.author: adithya-s-k

entries.name: Algorithmic Art
entries.description: Generates interactive algorithmic/generative art using p5.js, producing self-contained HTML artifacts with seeded randomness and parameter controls.
entries.author: anthropics

entries.name: Brand Guidelines
entries.description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography (Poppins/Lora) to artifacts such as slide decks and documents.
entries.author: anthropics

entries.name: Canvas Design
entries.description: Creates original museum-quality visual art as PNG or PDF files, guided by a generated design philosophy manifesto.
entries.author: anthropics

entries.name: Claude API Reference
entries.description: Reference documentation for the Claude API and Anthropic SDK — model IDs, pricing, streaming, tool use, MCP, caching, and token counting.
entries.author: anthropics

entries.name: Doc Co-Authoring
entries.description: Guides users through a 3-stage co-authoring workflow—context gathering, section-by-section refinement, and reader testing with a fresh Claude—for docs, specs, and proposals.
entries.author: anthropics

entries.name: DOCX
entries.description: Create, read, and edit Word (.docx) documents — new docs via the `docx` npm library, existing docs via an unpack-edit-repack XML workflow.
entries.author: anthropics

entries.name: Frontend Design
entries.description: Opinionated design guidance for creating distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with deliberate palette, typography, and layout choices.
entries.author: anthropics

entries.name: Internal Comms
entries.description: Writes internal communications—3P updates, company newsletters, FAQ answers, status reports, leadership updates, project updates, and incident reports—following company-appropriate formats.
entries.author: anthropics

entries.name: MCP Builder
entries.description: Step-by-step guide for building high-quality MCP servers in TypeScript or Python, covering tool design, testing with MCP Inspector, and evaluation.
entries.author: anthropics

entries.name: PDF
entries.description: Extract text/tables, merge, split, rotate, watermark, create, fill forms, OCR, and encrypt PDF files using Python libraries and CLI tools.
entries.author: anthropics

entries.name: PPTX
entries.description: Read, create, and edit PowerPoint (.pptx) presentations — text extraction via markitdown, creation via pptxgenjs, editing via XML unpack/repack.
